query:
SELECT 
  column_name,
  data_type,
  is_nullable
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_name = 'games'
  AND column_name IN (
    'awayML', 'homeML',
    'awaySpreadOdds', 'homeSpreadOdds',
    'overOdds', 'underOdds',
    'modelAwayML', 'modelHomeML',
    'modelAwaySpreadOdds', 'modelHomeSpreadOdds',
    'modelOverOdds', 'modelUnderOdds',
    'modelAwayPLOdds', 'modelHomePLOdds',
    'awayModelSpread', 'homeModelSpread',
    'awayBookSpread', 'homeBookSpread',
    'bookTotal', 'modelTotal',
    'spreadDiff', 'totalDiff',
    'spreadEdge', 'totalEdge'
  )
ORDER BY column_name
command:
